name: QRadar Audit: Expensive Log Sources
notes: This rule triggers when QRadar log sources are expensive. Optimize those log sources / log source extensions to reduce load in parsing and reduce a chance of unparsed events.
conditions_text: when the event matches QID is 38,750,143
TD_list: APPLY QRadar Audit: Expensive Log Sources on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event matches QID is 38,750,143
RED_list: Event description: Detects when QRadar log sources are expensive. Optimize those log sources / log source extensions to reduce load in parsing and reduce a chance of unparsed events.
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Source IP
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
